prompt:
Final lifestyle 1 — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a glowing-skin woman in her late 20s sitting at a sunlit modern dining table by tall floor-to-ceiling windows, mid-morning, in BRIGHT CLEAN DIRECT NATURAL DAYLIGHT pouring through the windows on the left side of the frame. She holds ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE delicately between her thumb and index finger, lifting it toward her parted lips with a soft warm smile, mid-bite. She wears a fitted oat-cream rib tank top and high-rise sand linen pants, hair in a loose low ponytail with face-framing strands, fresh-faced no makeup, sun-warmed glow.

>>> THE JAR — REALISTIC SCALE + CLEAN LIGHT BOUNCE <<<
A small realistic-sized Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (real supplement-bottle scale — roughly the size of a coffee mug, NOT oversized) sits on the warm-wood dining table beside her in the SAME bright direct daylight as her face. The light creates a SHARP CLEAN SPECULAR HIGHLIGHT — a bright vertical gleam — running down the curved side of the jar's glossy black plastic. The jar's front label catches the light fully and CRISPLY — every teal/cyan and gold/yellow brand detail reads sharply. The label IS the brightest cleanly-lit element on the table. A subtle clean reflection on the polished wood. Beside the jar a small ceramic dish holds 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also in the same bright daylight. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible.

Background: a softly out-of-focus bright modern dining room — a single tall ceramic vase with eucalyptus, a stack of two linen napkins on the table, soft white walls, tall windows pouring in bright open daylight. Bright airy real-photograph feel.

Lighting: BRIGHT CLEAN OPEN DAYLIGHT from the left wrapping BOTH the jar AND the woman uniformly — same crisp daylight bouncing cleanly off both her skin and the jar's glossy plastic. NO heavy shadows, NO orange tint, NO mood.

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the woman seated, gummy in the upper-third near her face, small realistic-sized jar in the lower-third with clear specular gleam.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture, sharp focus on jar with clean reflections, no AI artifacts.
